message.content:
Implement the following plan:

# Fix: Add Terms of Use & Privacy Policy links to Paywall (App Store Rejection)

## Context

Apple rejected the app because the subscription paywall (`OptimizedPaywallView.swift`) does not include functional links to Terms of Use (EULA) and Privacy Policy. Apple requires all auto-renewable subscription flows to include:

- Title of auto-renewing subscription
- Length of subscription
- Price of subscription
- **Functional links to Privacy Policy and Terms of Use (EULA)**

The paywall currently only has a text disclaimer ("A assinatura é renovada automaticamente...") in the `legalFooter` section (line 300-308) with **no clickable links**. The links already exist in `LegalSection.swift` and `AppInfoFooter.swift` pointing to `https://fittoday.app/terms` and `https://fittoday.app/privacy`.

## Plan

### 1. Add Terms & Privacy links to the paywall's `legalFooter`

**File:** `FitToday/Presentation/Features/Pro/OptimizedPaywallView.swift` (lines 300-308)

Update the `legalFooter` computed property to add the Terms and Privacy links below the existing auto-renewal disclaimer text. Reuse the same URLs already used in `AppInfoFooter.swift`:

```swift
private var legalFooter: some View {
    VStack(spacing: FitTodaySpacing.xs) {
        Text("paywall.legal.auto_renew".localized)
            .font(FitTodayFont.ui(size: 11, weight: .medium))
            .foregroundStyle(FitTodayColor.textTertiary)
            .multilineTextAlignment(.center)

        HStack(spacing: FitTodaySpacing.md) {
            Link("paywall.legal.terms".localized, destination: URL(string: "https://fittoday.app/terms")!)
            Text("•").foregroundStyle(FitTodayColor.textTertiary)
            Link("paywall.legal.privacy".localized, destination: URL(string: "https://fittoday.app/privacy")!)
        }
        .font(FitTodayFont.ui(size: 11, weight: .medium))
        .foregroundStyle(FitTodayColor.brandPrimary)
    }
    .padding(.horizontal, FitTodaySpacing.sm)
}
```

### 2. Add localization keys

**Files:**

- `Resources/en.lproj/Localizable.strings`
- `Resources/pt-BR.lproj/Localizable.strings`

Add keys:

- `"paywall.legal.auto_renew"` — existing disclaimer text
- `"paywall.legal.terms"` — "Terms of Use" / "Termos de Uso"
- `"paywall.legal.privacy"` — "Privacy Policy" / "Política de Privacidade"

### 3. Commit

## Files to Modify

1. `FitToday/FitToday/Presentation/Features/Pro/OptimizedPaywallView.swift` — add links to `legalFooter`
2. `FitToday/FitToday/Resources/en.lproj/Localizable.strings` — add 3 keys
3. `FitToday/FitToday/Resources/pt-BR.lproj/Localizable.strings` — add 3 keys

## Verification

1. Build the project
2. Open the paywall screen and confirm Terms/Privacy links appear below the auto-renewal text
3. Tap each link to verify they open in Safari


If you need specific details from before exiting plan mode (like exact code snippets, error messages, or content you generated), read the full transcript at: /Users/viniciuscarvalho/.REDACTED.jsonl

If this plan can be broken down into multiple independent tasks, consider using the TeamCreate tool to create a team and parallelize the work.

# Fix: Add Terms of Use & Privacy Policy links to Paywall (App Store Rejection)

## Context

Apple rejected the app because the subscription paywall (`OptimizedPaywallView.swift`) does not include functional links to Terms of Use (EULA) and Privacy Policy. Apple requires all auto-renewable subscription flows to include:

- Title of auto-renewing subscription
- Length of subscription
- Price of subscription
- **Functional links to Privacy Policy and Terms of Use (EULA)**

The paywall currently only has a text disclaimer ("A assinatura é renovada automaticamente...") in the `legalFooter` section (line 300-308) with **no clickable links**. The links already exist in `LegalSection.swift` and `AppInfoFooter.swift` pointing to `https://fittoday.app/terms` and `https://fittoday.app/privacy`.

## Plan

### 1. Add Terms & Privacy links to the paywall's `legalFooter`

**File:** `FitToday/Presentation/Features/Pro/OptimizedPaywallView.swift` (lines 300-308)

Update the `legalFooter` computed property to add the Terms and Privacy links below the existing auto-renewal disclaimer text. Reuse the same URLs already used in `AppInfoFooter.swift`:

```swift
private var legalFooter: some View {
    VStack(spacing: FitTodaySpacing.xs) {
        Text("paywall.legal.auto_renew".localized)
            .font(FitTodayFont.ui(size: 11, weight: .medium))
            .foregroundStyle(FitTodayColor.textTertiary)
            .multilineTextAlignment(.center)

        HStack(spacing: FitTodaySpacing.md) {
            Link("paywall.legal.terms".localized, destination: URL(string: "https://fittoday.app/terms")!)
            Text("•").foregroundStyle(FitTodayColor.textTertiary)
            Link("paywall.legal.privacy".localized, destination: URL(string: "https://fittoday.app/privacy")!)
        }
        .font(FitTodayFont.ui(size: 11, weight: .medium))
        .foregroundStyle(FitTodayColor.brandPrimary)
    }
    .padding(.horizontal, FitTodaySpacing.sm)
}
```

### 2. Add localization keys

**Files:**

- `Resources/en.lproj/Localizable.strings`
- `Resources/pt-BR.lproj/Localizable.strings`

Add keys:

- `"paywall.legal.auto_renew"` — existing disclaimer text
- `"paywall.legal.terms"` — "Terms of Use" / "Termos de Uso"
- `"paywall.legal.privacy"` — "Privacy Policy" / "Política de Privacidade"

### 3. Commit

## Files to Modify

1. `FitToday/FitToday/Presentation/Features/Pro/OptimizedPaywallView.swift` — add links to `legalFooter`
2. `FitToday/FitToday/Resources/en.lproj/Localizable.strings` — add 3 keys
3. `FitToday/FitToday/Resources/pt-BR.lproj/Localizable.strings` — add 3 keys

## Verification

1. Build the project
2. Open the paywall screen and confirm Terms/Privacy links appear below the auto-renewal text
3. Tap each link to verify they open in Safari

content.text:
Done. Here's what was changed:

1. **`OptimizedPaywallView.swift`** — Replaced the hardcoded disclaimer with a localized string and added `Link` views for Terms of Use and Privacy Policy below it, styled with `brandPrimary` color.
2. **`en.lproj/Localizable.strings`** — Added `paywall.legal.auto_renew`, `paywall.legal.terms`, `paywall.legal.privacy` keys.
3. **`pt-BR.lproj/Localizable.strings`** — Same keys with Portuguese translations.

Build passes. The paywall now shows clickable links to `https://fittoday.app/terms` and `https://fittoday.app/privacy`, which should resolve the App Store rejection.
